title: Ubiquiti EdgeRouter X
description: EdgeRouter X (ER-X) from Ubiquiti is a very small POE router equipped with 5 Gigabit Ethernet ports with 802.1q VLAN support and 256MB DDR3 operation memory. EdgeOS â¢, which is included and installed in the router is extremely efficient and stable operating system that supports IPv6, routing protocols OSPF and BGP, firewall and very popular VPN service. The intuitive, graphical user interface is easy to learn and makes routing features simple to configure and monitor. It includes an… VLAN 802.1q Static and dynamic routing (OSPF, RIP, BGP) VPN: IPsec, OpenVPN, PPTP, L2TP, PPTP) DHCP client and server Firewall (ACL-Based, Zone-Based) and NAT Dynamic DNS, DNS forwarding, DHCP relay, VRRP, RADIUS Client Management and monitoring Management: Web, Telnet, SSH, SNMP IPv6 and IPv4 protocols support QoS Device Power adapter 12V / 0.5A
